title: Phage lambda genome concatemerization
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jtcg","text":"This protocol is used to create concatemers of phage genomes. This is done by ligating phage lambda genomes using the overhangs at the cos site with T4 ligase. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add the following ingredients in a microcentrifuge tube. %s %s Ingredient Amount Ligation buffer 10X 2 µL DNA 6 µg PEG 4000 (40% W/W) 2.5 µL T4 DNA ligase 1 µ L (400 Weiss units) Water To 20 µL
creator: Marijn Ceelen
